ab: maha su nanu musa saliq?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: qmuyit cu toruy musa qmayah.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: maha nanu musa byo’ing hiya?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: mhkangi musa byo’ing hiya.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: gmlux su nanu musa ponxu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: gmlux cu kacu plaka.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: gmlux su nanu musa ponxu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: gmlux cu kacu gune musa ponxu.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: gmlux su nanu mwah muyax?
en: How do you go home?

ab: gmlux cu basu renki mwah muyax.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: Sayun gmlux su nanu mwah mqwas biru?
en: How does Sayun  go to school?

ab: gmlux kisya mwah mqwas biru qa Sayun.
en: Sayun goes to school by train.

ab: Yukan ga gmlux nanu musa kyokay?
en: How does Yukan go to church?

ab: gmlux zitensya mwah kyokay qa Yukan.
en: Yukan goes to church by bicycle.

ab: gmlux su renki basu musa mqwas biru?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: iyat, gmlux cu basu mwah mqwas biru.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: qmuyit su zitensya mwah mqwas biru?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: uya, qmuyit cu zitensya mwah mqwas biru.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: gmlux su kawtey kisya musa takaw?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: uya, gmlux cu kawtey kisya musa takaw.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: musa su takaw ga gmlux su kisya ini ga kacu plaka?
ch: A:你去高雄搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: gmlux cu kacu plaka, thuway qa kisya hiya.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: musa su kyokay ga gmlux su basu, ini ga qmuyit su toruy nanak?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: qmuyit cu toruy musa kyokay, thuway gmlux basu hiya.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: ksobih muyax mamu tbesan qeqaya?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: thiyaq hayi, qmuyit cu otobay musa kya tbbesan.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: ksobih kya pqwasan biru qa sskwan pila?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: sobih, hkangi lga tehok la.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: ksobih kya eki basu nniqan?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: mhtux su eki basu lga, kya hayi magan cpung lga tehok la.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
